engineGuide.h2: Vauxhall Crossland X Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Vauxhall Crossland X across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel
entries.history: PSA's efficient 1.5L BlueHDi replaced the 1.6L unit, bringing improved emissions compliance but complex AdBlue systems.
compatibleVariants: SE, SRi, SRi Nav, Elite, Elite Nav, Red Edition, Ultimate, GS Line
commonFailures: AdBlue injector blockage causing engine lockout (60k-90k miles)
EGR cooler carbon buildup reducing performance
NOx sensor failure triggering warning lights
entries.cta: Get quotes for DV5 Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel
entries.history: Lower-output variant of the DV5 family, tuned for entry-level Crossland X trims with focus on fuel economy.
commonFailures: DPF regeneration failure on short-journey driving
Turbo actuator sticking at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for YH5 Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel
entries.history: Higher-output DV5 derivative for premium Crossland X variants, delivering stronger mid-range torque.

entries.title: pressure fuel pump wear causing hard starting
entries.cta: Get quotes for YH6 Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

entries.title: 1.6L Diesel
entries.history: Early Crossland X diesel option, robust but increasingly rare as PSA transitioned to the 1.5L BlueHDi family.
commonFailures: Swirl flap mechanism failure causing rough idle
Timing chain tensioner wear above 80k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for DV6FED Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

entries.title: 1.2L Petrol Turbo
entries.history: The dominant PureTech unit in Crossland X, offering strong efficiency but requiring strict maintenance to avoid timing belt issues.
compatibleVariants: SE, SRi, SRi Nav, Elite, Elite Nav, Red Edition, Ultimate, GS Line
commonFailures: Timing belt degradation in oil causing catastrophic failure (50k-80k miles)
Fuel dilution of engine oil from direct injection

entries.title: pressure fuel pump wear causing misfires
entries.cta: Get quotes for EB2ADTD Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

entries.title: 1.2L Petrol Turbo High Output
entries.history: Higher-output variant of the EB2 family, fitted to sportier Crossland X trims with enhanced throttle response.
compatibleVariants: SRi, SRi Nav, Red Edition, GS Line
commonFailures: Turbocharger wastegate sticking causing boost loss
Oil consumption increase due to PCV valve wear
entries.cta: Get quotes for EB2DT Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

entries.title: 1.2L Petrol Naturally Aspirated
entries.history: Entry-level PureTech option for early Crossland X models, simpler but less powerful than turbocharged variants.
commonFailures: Ignition coil failure causing cylinder misfire
Camshaft position sensor faults triggering limp mode
entries.cta: Get quotes for EB2FA Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Vauxhall Crossland X Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense

problems.h4: PureTech Timing Belt-in-Oil Failure - Why EB2 Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Crossland X SE, SRi, Elite (2017-2024, EB2ADTD & EB2DT)
problems.rootCause: The timing belt runs in oil and can degrade prematurely, shedding material that blocks the oil pump pickup, causing catastrophic oil starvation.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Timing belt, tensioner, oil pump replacement before failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early; not possible after oil starvation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace damaged bearings, pistons, clean oil galleries
repairOptions.longevity: Costly; may not address all wear; limited long-term value

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded belt system, bench tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for severe damage; addresses root cause; 12-month warranty

problems.recommendation: If your Crossland X PureTech shows early warning signs (rattling, oil pressure warning), a preventative belt service is cost-effective. Once oil starvation occurs, replacement with a rebuilt EB2 unit featuring the updated belt system is almost always better value than attempting a partial repair.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EB2ADTD engine prices for your Vauxhall Crossland X

problems.h4: BlueHDi AdBlue System Faults - Why DV5 Engines Immobilise
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Crossland X SE, SRi, Elite (2019-2024, DV5 & YH5/YH6)
problems.rootCause: AdBlue injector nozzles clog with crystallised urea, or the NOx sensor fails, triggering a countdown to engine immobilisation as required by emissions regulations.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace AdBlue injector, reset system codes
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for early-stage clogging; may recur without water quality care

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty NOx sensor, perform emissions system calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Resolves warning lights; doesn't address injector wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with updated AdBlue components, full system check
repairOptions.longevity: Best for multiple system failures; includes warranty; eliminates recurring faults

problems.recommendation: For isolated AdBlue faults, injector cleaning or NOx sensor replacement offers good value. If your Crossland X has multiple emissions system warnings or has entered immobilisation mode, a rebuilt DV5 engine with updated components often proves more economical than repeated specialist repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for DV5 Vauxhall Crossland X diesel engine replacement

problems.h4: PureTech High-Pressure Fuel Pump Failure - EB2 Performance Loss
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Crossland X SRi, Elite, GS Line (2017-2024, EB2ADTD & EB2DT)
problems.rootCause: The direct-injection high-pressure fuel pump wears internally, causing low fuel pressure, misfires, and eventually complete loss of power.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace HPFP, flush fuel lines, reset adaptation values
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if caught before injector damage; doesn't address belt risks

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded fuel system components, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best for high-mileage units or combined failures; addresses multiple wear points

problems.recommendation: If your Crossland X PureTech shows early fuel pressure warnings but no misfires, HPFP replacement is sensible. For engines over 90k miles or with additional symptoms, a rebuilt EB2 unit offers better long-term value and peace of mind.
problems.cta: Compare EB2DT rebuilt engine costs for your Vauxhall Crossland X

problems.h4: BlueHDi DPF Regeneration Failure - Diesel Particulate Issues
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Crossland X all diesel variants (2017-2024, DV5/DV6/YH series)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents active DPF regeneration, causing soot accumulation that eventually blocks the filter and triggers limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnostic reset, forced DPF burn cycle, additive top-up
repairOptions.longevity: Works for early blockage; requires changed driving habits to prevent recurrence

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, professionally clean or replace DPF unit, reset system
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for moderate blockage; doesn't address underlying driving pattern

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with new or cleaned DPF, full system validation
repairOptions.longevity: Best for high-mileage diesels with multiple faults; includes warranty coverage

problems.recommendation: For early DPF warnings, a forced regeneration service is cost-effective if you can adjust your driving. For Crossland X diesels over 100k miles or with combined EGR/AdBlue issues, a rebuilt DV5 engine often represents better value than repeated component replacements.
problems.cta: Find rebuilt DV5 diesel engines for your Vauxhall Crossland X

problems.h4: PureTech Turbocharger Oil Seal Failure - Boost Pressure Loss
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Crossland X SRi, Red Edition, GS Line (2017-2024, EB2DT & EB2ADTD turbo variants)
problems.rootCause: Turbocharger oil seals wear, allowing oil into the intake or exhaust, causing blue smoke, boost loss, and potential catalyst damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove turbo, replace seals and bearings, balance, refit
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if turbo housing is undamaged; doesn't address engine wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with new or refurbished turbo, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best for high-mileage engines or combined failures; comprehensive solution

problems.recommendation: If your Crossland X PureTech shows early turbo oil leaks but no performance loss, a turbo rebuild is sensible. For engines with additional symptoms or over 90k miles, a rebuilt EB2 unit offers better long-term reliability and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Get quotes for EB2DT Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Vauxhall Crossland X
finalCta.paragraph: Whether your Crossland X faces PureTech timing belt risks or BlueHDi AdBlue faults, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Vauxhall Crossland X Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Vauxhall Crossland X and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Vauxhall Crossland X Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Vauxhall Crossland X production run (2017-2024), helping you identify your engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Crossland X launched with PSA's EB2 PureTech petrol and DV6 1.6L BlueHDi diesel engines, establishing the P17 platform in the UK small SUV segment.
keyChanges: Vauxhall Crossland X launched in UK market, replacing Meriva
Initial engine lineup: 1.2L PureTech EB2FA/EB2ADTD petrol, 1.6L BlueHDi DV6FED diesel
PSA platform sharing with Peugeot 2008 and Citroën C3 Aircross confirmed
knownFor: Strong initial sales in UK small SUV segment
Early reports of PureTech oil consumption on high-mileage examples
DV6FED proven reliability but complex emissions systems
PSA platform parts commonality aiding aftermarket support
years.cta: Get quotes for 2017 Vauxhall Crossland X replacement engines
years.ticker: Vauxhall Crossland X 2017 engine replacement • EB2ADTD timing belt concern • DV6FED DPF fault

years.description: Mid-cycle updates introduced the newer 1.5L BlueHDi DV5 engine alongside refined PureTech units, improving emissions compliance but adding AdBlue system complexity.
keyChanges: 1.5L BlueHDi DV5 engine introduced, replacing 1.6L DV6 from late 2019
PureTech EB2ADTD/EB2DT received minor calibration updates
SRi Nav and Elite Nav trim levels added with enhanced equipment
popularModels: Vauxhall Crossland X SRi Nav 1.2L Petrol
Vauxhall Crossland X Elite Nav 1.5L Diesel
Vauxhall Crossland X Red Edition 1.2L Petrol
knownFor: Growing awareness of PureTech timing belt-in-oil failure pattern
DV5 AdBlue system faults emerging on higher-mileage examples
Strong used market demand for well-maintained SRi and Elite variants
PSA platform engine commonality aiding specialist rebuild supply
years.cta: Get quotes for 2019 Vauxhall Crossland X replacement engines
years.ticker: Vauxhall Crossland X 2019 engine replacement • DV5 AdBlue fault • EB2DT turbo seal leak

years.description: The Crossland X received visual updates and Euro 6d emissions compliance, with engine lineups stabilising around the 1.2L PureTech and 1.5L BlueHDi families.
keyChanges: Visual refresh with updated front/rear styling for 2021 model year
All engines updated to Euro 6d emissions standard
"Crossland" badging introduced on some markets (UK retained Crossland X)
popularModels: Vauxhall Crossland X GS Line 1.2L Petrol
knownFor: Increased PureTech replacement enquiries as first wave hit 60k+ miles
DV5 AdBlue system faults becoming common replacement driver
Strong specialist rebuild supply for EB2 and DV5 codes
ULEZ compliance driving London-based replacement demand
years.cta: Get quotes for 2021 Vauxhall Crossland X replacement engines
years.ticker: Vauxhall Crossland X 2021 engine replacement • EB2ADTD belt failure • DV5 NOx sensor fault

years.description: Final Crossland X production years saw stable engine lineups with GS Line and Ultimate trims dominating new registrations before model discontinuation.
keyChanges: GS Line and Ultimate trims became volume sellers
No major engine changes; focus on trim and equipment updates
Model discontinued in UK market during 2024
popularModels: Vauxhall Crossland X GS Line 1.2L Petrol
Vauxhall Crossland X Elite Nav 1.5L Diesel
knownFor: Late-model examples commanding strong used values
PureTech belt-in-oil failures now well-documented across mileage range
DV5 AdBlue system faults remaining key replacement driver
Specialist rebuild market mature with competitive pricing for EB2/DV5

faq.h2: Vauxhall Crossland X Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement cost?
items.answer: A rebuilt Vauxhall Crossland X engine typically costs £1,200-£3,200 supply-only, depending on engine code and variant. Diesel DV5 units start around £1,200, while PureTech EB2ADTD petrol units range £1,400-£3,200.
keyPoints: Prices vary by engine code, variant and supplier
Supply & fit adds £400-£900 labour typically
Rebuilt units include 12-month warranty standard
Compare multiple quotes to secure best value
items.cta: Compare Vauxhall Crossland X engine prices from UK specialists

items.question: What engine codes does the Vauxhall Crossland X use?
items.answer: The Vauxhall Crossland X uses PSA-derived engine codes: petrol EB2ADTD, EB2DT, EB2FA (1.2L PureTech) and diesel DV5, YH5, YH6, DV6FED (1.5L/1.6L BlueHDi).
keyPoints: EB2ADTD is the dominant PureTech code across trims
DV5 replaced DV6FED as the main diesel from 2019
Engine code is critical for compatibility verification
Use DVLA lookup or VIN check to confirm your code
items.cta: Verify your Vauxhall Crossland X engine code free

items.question: Is a reconditioned Vauxhall Crossland X engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes, a professionally reconditioned Vauxhall Crossland X engine from a vetted UK specialist is reliable, especially when it includes upgraded components addressing known PureTech or BlueHDi failure points.
keyPoints: Reconditioned units undergo strip-down and part replacement
Bench testing and compression checks are standard
12-month warranty provides post-installation protection
Choose suppliers with Crossland X-specific experience
items.cta: Find reconditioned Vauxhall Crossland X engines with warranty

items.question: How long does Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only Vauxhall Crossland X engines typically dispatch within 1-3 working days; supply & fit installations take 1-2 days at a specialist garage, subject to parts availability.
keyPoints: In-stock engines can dispatch same-day if ordered early
ECU coding and immobiliser matching add time
Supply & fit bookings depend on garage availability
Allow extra time for rare engine codes or variants
items.cta: Check live Vauxhall Crossland X engine stock and delivery

items.question: Do I need to reprogram the ECU after Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacement?
items.answer: Most Vauxhall Crossland X engine replacements require ECU immobiliser handshake but not full reprogramming; specialist garages handle this as part of the supply & fit service.
keyPoints: PSA-platform engines use immobiliser pairing, not full coding
Diagnostic tools required for handshake procedure
Supply & fit services include this step typically
DIY installations may need specialist diagnostic support
items.cta: Find Vauxhall Crossland X specialists offering ECU handshake

items.question: What warranty comes with a Vauxhall Crossland X replacement engine?
items.answer: Replacement Vauxhall Crossland X engines from EngineMarket's network include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with some suppliers offering extended coverage options.
keyPoints: 12-month warranty is standard across network suppliers
Coverage includes parts and labour for warranty claims
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
Confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase
items.cta: Compare Vauxhall Crossland X engine warranty terms

items.question: Can I fit a Vauxhall Crossland X engine myself?
items.answer: While technically possible, fitting a Vauxhall Crossland X engine yourself is not recommended due to PSA-platform ECU immobiliser requirements and complex ancillary systems like AdBlue on diesel models.
keyPoints: Immobiliser pairing requires specialist diagnostic equipment
AdBlue system calibration needed on DV5/YH diesel units
Incorrect installation can void warranty and cause damage
Supply & fit services remove technical and warranty risks
items.cta: Book Vauxhall Crossland X engine supply & fit service

items.question: How do I know which Vauxhall Crossland X engine is compatible with my car?
items.answer: Use your Vauxhall Crossland X registration number in our free DVLA lookup tool to instantly verify compatible engine codes, variants and replacement options for your specific vehicle.
keyPoints: DVLA lookup confirms exact variant and engine code
Chassis code and production year affect compatibility
PSA platform sharing means cross-reference with Peugeot/Citroën
Our compatibility guarantee ensures correct fitment
items.cta: Check Vauxhall Crossland X engine compatibility free

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in a Vauxhall Crossland X?
items.answer: Yes, replacing the engine in a Vauxhall Crossland X is often worthwhile given the vehicle's strong residual values and the availability of cost-effective rebuilt units from £1,200, especially versus main dealer pricing.
keyPoints: Crossland X values remain strong in UK used market
Rebuilt engines cost 50-70% less than main dealer replacements
12-month warranty provides post-installation confidence
Compare repair vs replace costs using our decision tool
items.cta: Use our Vauxhall Crossland X repair vs replace calculator

items.question: What is the most common Vauxhall Crossland X engine problem?
items.answer: The most common Vauxhall Crossland X engine problem is PureTech timing belt degradation in oil (EB2ADTD/EB2DT), followed by BlueHDi AdBlue system faults (DV5/YH series) on diesel models.
keyPoints: PureTech belt failure typically occurs 50k-80k miles
AdBlue faults can immobilise diesel Crossland X models
Both issues have known upgraded replacement solutions
Early diagnosis and preventative maintenance reduce risk
